scene.message: Mark: Let's hurry to the{nl} forest!{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Let's hurry to the{nl} shrine!{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Let's hurry to the{nl} school!{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: I'm hungry~ But hold{nl} it, hold it!{waitkey}{ret}
Brown: It's an eatery, so it's{nl} praying to the gods, huh?{waitkey}Dehyahyahyahyahya.{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: {ctl07:1}, we can't be{nl} taking it easy.{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: {ctl07:1}, we mustn't be{nl} taking it easy.{waitkey}{ret}
